name: Casserole Del Italiano
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Medium egg noodles, cooked and drained
1 lb Lean ground beef, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine the cooked beef and sauces in a bowl, allowing them to simmer for 5 minutes. Do not boil.
3. In another bowl, mix together the cottage cheese, cream cheese, and sour cream. Add chopped green onions, minced green peppers, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, and salt. Blend well.
4. Grease a 9x13 glass dish lightly.
5. Place half of the cooked noodles in the bottom of the dish. Spread the cheese mixture evenly over the noodles.
6. Top with the remaining noodles.
7. Pour the meat sauce over the top and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes, uncovered. Do not overbake. Serves 8-10.
